mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE book_id = #{book_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review ( member_idx, book_id, review_text, review_score, review_image1, review_image2, review_image3, review_date ) VALUES ( #{member_idx}, #{book_id}, #{review_text}, #{review_score}, #{review_image1}, #{review_image2}, #{review_image3}, NOW() )
